home.hero_title: Import your car from Germany without surprises
home.hero_subtitle: Paste a mobile.de listing link and get an instant ISV estimate. Know the total cost before you buy.
home.step1_desc: Search on mobile.de and copy the link of the car you want to import.
home.step2_desc: Paste the link into the simulator. We extract the specs and calculate the estimated ISV automatically.
home.step3_desc: Ready to proceed? Send us the details and we'll prepare a full import quote.
home.feature_sim_desc: Estimate the Vehicle Tax for any car on mobile.de — petrol, diesel, hybrid or electric.
home.feature_prop_desc: Receive a personalised quote including ISV, customs clearance, transport and registration.
home.disclaimer: ISV values shown are estimates based on CISV 2025 tables. The final value is determined by the Portuguese Tax Authority (AT) after official inspection.

simulate.title: ISV Simulator
simulate.subtitle: Paste a mobile.de listing link and get an ISV estimate to import the vehicle to Portugal.
simulate.error_invalid: Must be a valid mobile.de link

result.electric_exempt: Electric vehicles are exempt from ISV (€ 0.00)
result.disclaimer: Estimate based on CISV 2025 tables. The final ISV value is determined by the Portuguese Tax Authority (AT) after official vehicle inspection.

proposal.title: Request Quote
proposal.subtitle: Fill in the form and we'll prepare a personalised import quote for you.
proposal.placeholder_message: Describe the car you want to import...
proposal.error_car_link_invalid: Link must be a valid URL

success.title: Request sent!
success.message: We've received your quote request and will be in touch shortly.

footer.disclaimer: ISV values shown are estimates — the final value depends on official inspection.
